paragraphs: BTC sits at $74,735 down 3.31% on the day and 4.71% on the week. Breadth printed 3/20 green at the top with Canton the only positive read. Iran airspace closure markets jumped to 39.3% YES from 29.4% with the May 24 deadline landing tomorrow. Warsh sworn in as Fed Chair this week converted the rate-delay thesis from signal to policy. ETF outflows hit $1.26B weekly with IBIT named as the lead outflow vehicle.

Perps tape reads QUIET. One MOMENTUM print (BSB at +201.88% 7d on funding +0.056%/8h, two ticks below the DIST gate) against 24 NEUTRAL across 25 assessed. No DISTRIBUTION fires, no CAPITULATION completes today. EDEN sits one liquidation gate short of CAPITULATION as the cascade ran earlier in the day. BCH carries the heaviest smart-money exit in the universe — top-trader long/short ratio dropped 1.43 points over the week on a -17% bleed. Funding flat to slightly negative across the universe. The leverage stack is unwinding without panic.

The record-low consumer sentiment print on gas prices confirms the conflict transmission landing in spending. Hormuz risk premium feeds oil, oil feeds gas, gas feeds spending contraction, the contraction feeds stagflationary pressure that pushes rate relief further out. The setup favors continuation shorts on weak names with confirmed smart-money exit. Aggressive new longs without a sector catalyst face the equity-to-consumer sentiment gap as the headwind.
market_sentiment.bias_line: Bias · short the bleed on smart-money-confirmed exits, ride the relative strength on existing longs.

current_positions.thesis_note: Narrative-tracker promoted AI agents and Decentralized compute Peak → Rising in the same session — sector tailwind re-firmed. Late longs unwound without panic, funding repaired above 7d average.
current_positions.watch: Pct_24h -0.86% with OI -3.96% means late longs unwound on a stack that built +127% over the past week. Funding repaired to +0.0085%/8h above the 7d average — fresh longs are paying premium into the consolidation. Day 2 of 3, horizon expires tomorrow. Watching $2.05 close as the line that fires close.

current_positions.thesis_note: HYPE printed +1.84% on a -3.31% BTC day. Smart money still building (top L/S +0.13 7d), funding repaired above 7d average, narrative-tracker promoted Hyperliquid Fading → Peak, AIXBT names today's consensus outperformer.
current_positions.invalidation: close below $54 (revised from $56 after the original breach absorbed yesterday on the three-feed confluence)
current_positions.watch: HYPE printed +1.84% on a -3.31% BTC day — relative strength of 5.15 points on a red tape. Funding repaired to +0.0081%/8h from the +0.0009% 7d average. Top trader long/short ratio rose 0.13 points over 7 days. AIXBT names HYPE as today's consensus outperformer with Grayscale 3rd ETF amendment and Bitwise BHYP at $30M AUM in five days. Watching $54 close as the revised invalidation.

current_positions.thesis_note: Day 1, position flat. Top trader long/short already net short at 0.75 means trade is partially priced. Narrative-tracker holds Privacy/ZK FADE at Day 5. AIXBT bullish ZEC framing is grounding talk without flow confirmation.
current_positions.watch: Top trader long/short ratio at 0.75 is already net short — the trade is partially priced. AIXBT promoted ZEC privacy to crypto item #3 today with $600 / 800% YTD framing while narrative-tracker held Privacy/ZK FADE at Day 5 absent from drivers. The conflict resolver is whether fresh on-chain accumulation backs the narrative push or it stays commentary-only. Top L/S flip back above 0.85 or a narrative-tracker promotion of Privacy/ZK off FADE fires close.

thesis: BCH closed -4.35% today extending a 7d bleed of -17.04%. The drawdown is the deepest in today's universe and unfolded without leverage rebuild — open interest dropped 9.88% over the same week.
Top-trader long/short ratio collapsed 1.43 points over 7 days. That's the heaviest smart-money exit in the entire perps universe today — the long-side conviction has rolled off completely.
Funding sits at -0.0336%/8h, well below the 7d average of -0.0127%. Spot premium against shorted futures reads as continuation positioning, not a panic flush waiting to bounce.

Bitcoin Cash carries no narrative tailwind from today's tracker map. The macro frame is risk-off with breadth at 3/20 green and BTC sub-$75K third session — no catalyst on the calendar to defend the bid.
risks: Majors stabilizing fires a relief bounce across legacy alts. BCH could squeeze on Bitcoin halving anniversary noise or oversold technicals regardless of the structural read.
Cash-and-carry desks holding spot-premium positions unwind in either direction on funding normalization, removing the directional asymmetry.

thesis: GENIUS closed -6.93% today with open interest dropping 6.43% in the same window. Liquidations printed $498K — 2.76 times the 7d p75 of $180K. perps-scan named the structure CAPITULATION-shaped flow.
Top-trader long/short ratio fell 0.37 points over 7 days while open interest built 124% in the same period. Smart money is fading the Binance listing pump while retail leverage stays crowded long.
Funding flipped negative to -0.0005%/8h from the +0.0073% 7d average. The premium-paying long stack now pays nothing — the support that justified the leverage just lifted.
Cross-feed conflict with today's token-call HIGH 9/10 LONG on the same name. Per soul, perps positioning wins commentary when the chart confirms the structural shape. Tape fired the short side first.
risks: Late-stage capitulations often print a violent bounce as forced shorts cover. Thin-float listing pumps can extend past reasonable funding levels.
Promotional flow from Binance or partner exchanges could relight the bid on no fundamental change.

watchlist.trigger: taker buy clean through 52% with OI continuing to build, OR pct_24h breaks +10% with funding holding under +0.02%/8h
watchlist.invalidation: close below $250 OR funding flips negative before trigger fires
thesis: Decentralized compute held 5/5 in narrative-tracker today with the phase promoted Peak → Rising in the same session. Narrative tailwind re-firms for a second day.

Pct_24h -1.65% with OI -6.17% means late longs unwound on the chop. Funding +0.0032%/8h still above the 7d average, holding the passive build. Taker buy 44.91% sits below the 52% gate that would fire the breakout.
The setup remains structural compression pre-breakout. The thesis lives as long as funding stays positive and OI rebuilds. A clean taker-buy break above 52% is the operator-verifiable trigger.

watchlist.trigger: liquidations print past $2M with funding holding negative, OR fresh -10% day with open interest extending lower
thesis: EDEN closed -11.24% today with open interest down 30.10% in the same 24 hours. Funding rolled back to -0.0185%/8h — the sign-flip block that previously held CAPITULATION out has lifted.
Only the liquidation gate ($866K vs 7d p75 $2.1M) holds the regime back now. Pct_4h sits at +1.67% — the cascade ended in the last few hours and structure rebuilt.
A second leg down with liquidations pushing past the $2M threshold completes the CAPITULATION setup. Entering now is chasing the bounce, not riding the flush.

watchlist.trigger: pct_24h breaks -5% with displacement on heavy taker sell, OR top-trader long/short ratio collapses to 1.00 with funding flipped negative
thesis: ETF outflows hit $1.26B weekly with IBIT named as the lead outflow vehicle. Institutional derisking is quantified. Breadth at 3/20 green and Fear & Greed pinned at 28 marks the macro state.
Funding sits flat at +0.0044%/8h and top trader long/short at 1.14 +0.16 over 7 days — smart money slightly long, retail not positioned at extreme yet. The setup is macro-driven, not perps-driven.
The trigger names the perps signal that would convert the macro bias to a fireable structure: heavy taker sell displacement, or the smart-money stack rolling off in earnest.

evaluations.note: Day 2/3 late session. Price recovered from morning $2.058 touch to $2.083 (+1.21% intraday off the low). Pct_4h +1.12% means bid returned over the last 4 hours. AI agents and Decentralized compute both promoted Peak → Rising in the same chain — narrative tailwind re-firms. OI -3.96% means late longs unwound without panic. Funding +0.0085%/8h above the 7d average — fresh longs paying premium into the consolidation. Holding for horizon expiry tomorrow.

Day 2/multi-week late session. Price recovered to $55.632 (+0.92% pct_4h) above the revised $54 invalidation. Same session printed +1.84% 24h on -3.31% BTC — 5.15pp relative strength on a red tape. AIXBT names HYPE as consensus outperformer (Grayscale 3rd ETF amendment + Bitwise BHYP $30M AUM in five days + USDC prediction markets). Narrative-tracker holds Hyperliquid at Peak 4/5 RIDE w/ trail. Top L/S 1.34 +0.13 over 7 days — smart money still building. Holding.

Day 1/7. Position essentially flat (-0.24% adverse, since SHORT). Pct_24h +1.22% means ZEC closed up despite the broader -3.3% market. Top L/S 0.75 (down 0.16 over 7 days) is already net short — trade partially priced. AIXBT promoted ZEC privacy to crypto item #3 today with $600 / 800% YTD framing (entire RWA item displaced) — bullish ZEC commentary. Narrative-tracker holds Privacy/ZK FADE at Day 5 absent from drivers — bearish ZEC structure. Per soul, price wins commentary when they diverge. Today ZEC closed green so commentary is winning the immediate read. Holding day 1 — the 7d -7.67% from $667.93 peak structure is the thesis.

add_watchlist.trigger: liquidations print past $2M with funding holding negative, OR fresh -10% day with open interest extending lower
thesis: EDEN closed -11.24% today with open interest down 30.10% in the same 24 hours. Funding rolled back to -0.0185%/8h — the sign-flip block that previously held CAPITULATION out has lifted.

Funding normalization absent fresh distribution removes the asymmetry.

add_watchlist.trigger: pct_24h breaks -5% with displacement on heavy taker sell, OR top-trader long/short ratio collapses to 1.00 with funding flipped negative

named_risks: BTC has held the $74K floor across three sessions. Without displacement the bid keeps absorbing into the bleed.
Iran de-escalation reverses the macro thesis overnight — Hormuz premium drops, oil drops, rate-cut path returns.
